outro.title: Ready?
outro.description: Before you start practicing, visit the Knowledge Station to learn the theoretical foundations of this algorithm!

swapButton.title: Swap Layout
swapButton.description: Click this button to swap the left code panel and the right canvas, so you can find the learning layout that suits you best.

resizeHandle.title: Resize Panels Horizontally
resizeHandle.description: Drag the divider between the left and right panels to freely adjust the width ratio between the code panel and the visualization area.

resizeHandleV.title: Resize Panels Vertically
resizeHandleV.description: Drag the divider between the top and bottom panels to freely adjust the height ratio between the visualization canvas and the data controls panel.

canvasPanel.title: Visualization Canvas
canvasPanel.description: This is the main stage for the algorithm animation. You can zoom and pan the canvas to observe the changes at each step.

controlBar.title: Playback Controls
controlBar.description: Use play, pause, previous, and next to control the animation speed. You can also drag the progress bar to jump to any step.

codePanel.title: Code Panel
codePanel.description: The left panel shows the corresponding pseudocode or Python implementation. The currently executing line is highlighted automatically.
